All right guys, we are back for theme plate 13 and this is the point of no return and what we're doing here is we're highlighting the cost of going Backwards so we're detailing that burning Crash in the rear view painting a picture that the prospect will want to continue driving away from as far and fast as possible So this is the classic risk Revealer you know really bringing that intimacy with the stakes and creating more Tension and going backwards than moving Forward so in short, this is what the container looks like you will first start off by listing out what tomorrow Will hold for them independent of your product whether or not you buy dot dot dot That's what you're looking for in step one You'll then future pace what success using your product can look like And then you'll show and contrast that with the burning crash in the rear view which will include your moment of highest tension then you'll briefly Restate and really kind of reaffirm Recontextualize those reframes a lot of re's there and sacred cows from the pre-launch So we're reinforcing them here and then invite them to move forward continue driving on With your program and lead into your call to action So it's a short one. It's a good one. So let's dive into the example Burning man versus broken funnels the doors to 10x launches are now open But whether or not you join you're still going to be building funnels You're still going to be launching new online courses masterminds and programs You're still going to be manning the controls of your convert kit MailChimp drip and fusion software Whatever the heck you're using to send out messages that get people to buy and the growth of your online business The number of employees you can bring in to do the stuff You're not great at and the number of weeks you can take up this year to do the things you swore You'd finally cross up your bucket list like that trip to Bali hiking Machu Pichu or doing whatever the hell people do at burning man Will all be a result of what happened in the moment after you hit Send so we're tying all those future-paced outcomes the ones that are on their radar and linking that to That action of what happens when you hit send No pressure, but here's where you have a choice We can pull a good old-fashioned men-in-black memory swipe on you and erase everything you've learned over the last seven days That way you can constantly dig your head back into the proverbial sand and return to the cozy and familiar and narrative that All I need is the latest funnel who cares about that pesky execution thing Even if I need to execute I'll just throw a bone to one of those copywriters clamoring for work They're all super cheap and affordable So really bringing those sacred cows that we worked on in the pre-launch back into the fold. Oh, guess I was wrong It's cool. I got this I'll put some bulletproof coffee in the pot swipe a bit of this a bit of that and fire it off Because I have this super fancy funnel and some ninja Facebook retargeting stuff rolling out the copy thing can't be that important So once again that burning fire and then oh crap why isn't this converting my Facebook ads must be broken My pixel must not be firing correctly wait. I don't even know what a pixel is but I heard it was important Or maybe I should have done a webinar. Ah, all good. I'm just gonna fail forward I'll buy that new program or funnel course or whatever and crush it next time So really kind of reflecting back that Absurd narrative that is so common for this market, you know and giving them a chance to see oh that is a train wreck That is a burning fire. I don't want that. I'm gonna drive as far away from that inner monologue as possible And speaking about an inner monologue, that's a great way to dial up specificity, you know So when you are writing these types of bullets Feel free to play around with an inner monologue like writing it from the perspective of What your prospect would be thinking or feeling in either real time or a future pace time? So that's an extra little writing tip Painful glad we're graduating out of that Here's your second option. So here's where we Contrast it and give them a chance to really cash in on this They've been exclusively empowered and they see a new way you can leverage the hard-earned insights You've integrated into your synapses over this past week that execution is everything and that funnel only be strong as the words that Fill it that you and you alone are responsible for executing sure There's a time and place to bring on a copywriter, but just like some of the world's top entrepreneurs still write their own It's your job as someone who's in charge of bringing in profits to take full ownership and control and that hey It's not as crazy hard as it looks and wow I don't even need to memorize formulas to horn my words into rigid templates or hand write old sales letters until my wrist hurts before Being confident enough to knock out hot converting copy that makes the cash register Ring so we're really not adding new arguments here We're restating the beliefs and arguments that were presented into pre-launch except now it's Recontextualized with our program I can just get my 10x launches login info achieve minimum vial mastery over this launch copy thing and use one of 20 plus proven Deamplates to fuel my highest conversions yet Yep, that's an option and Arguably the only one you will only one arguably the only one that will have you hiking your version of Machu Picchu by Quarters end to celebrate your best launch yet Because whether or not you join 10x launches you're in the online business game for the long haul time to play it with a stacked Deck so this is just showing that we are entering their reality and their goals. We're not changing it We just we're showing that our program And the results it generates is fully in sync with where they're at and where they're going So it's just a much more natural seamless Transition into that so that is the point of no return. We're really Showing those flames in the rear view. We're showing them the clear more promising road ahead contrasting the two Which kind of brings in this risk mitigation?
